function.name: take_screenshot
function.description: Captures a screenshot of the entire screen or active window. Use this when the user asks what's on their screen, to see their screen, or to help with something visible.

mode.description: Whether to capture the full screen or just the active window. Default is 'full'.

function.name: search_web
function.description: Searches the web for information. Use this when the user asks about current events, facts you don't know, or anything requiring up-to-date information.

query.description: The search query to look up

function.name: open_application
function.description: Opens an application or program on the computer. Use this when the user asks to open, launch, or start an application.

app_name.description: Name of the application to open (e.g., 'notepad', 'chrome', 'calculator')

function.name: read_file
function.description: Reads the contents of a file from the file system. Use this when the user asks about file contents or wants to know what's in a file.

file_path.description: The full path to the file to read

function.name: write_file
function.description: Writes or creates a file with the specified content. Use this when the user asks to create a file, save something, or write content to disk.

file_path.description: The full path where the file should be saved

content.description: The content to write to the file

function.name: execute_command
function.description: Executes a system command or shell command. Use this when the user asks to run a command, execute something in the terminal, or perform system operations.

function.name: get_system_info
function.description: Gets system information like CPU usage, memory usage, disk space, etc. Use this when the user asks about computer performance or system status.

info_type.description: Type of system information to retrieve

function.name: set_reminder
function.description: Sets a reminder or alarm for a specific time. Use this when the user asks to remind them about something or set an alarm.

time.description: When to trigger the reminder (e.g., '5 minutes', '2 hours', '3:30 PM')

function.name: get_weather
function.description: Gets current weather information for a location. Use this when the user asks about weather conditions.

location.description: City name or location to get weather for

function.name: control_volume
function.description: Controls system volume. Use this when the user asks to change volume, mute, or unmute.

value.description: Volume level (0-100) when action is 'set', or amount to increase/decrease by

function.name: spotify_play
function.description: Play a specific song, artist, or playlist on Spotify, or resume current playback. Use this when user asks to play music, resume playback, or start a specific song.

query.description: Search query for the track, artist, or playlist to play. If not provided, resumes current playback.

function.name: spotify_pause
function.description: Pause the current Spotify playback. Use this when user asks to pause, stop, or halt music.

function.name: spotify_skip_next
function.description: Skip to the next track in Spotify queue. Use this when user asks to skip, next track, or play the next song.

function.name: spotify_skip_previous
function.description: Go back to the previous track on Spotify. Use this when user asks to go back, previous track, or replay last song.

function.name: spotify_add_to_queue
function.description: Search for a song and add it to the Spotify playback queue. Use this when user asks to queue a song or add to queue.

query.description: Search query for the track to add to queue

function.name: spotify_current_track
function.description: Get information about the currently playing track on Spotify. Use this when user asks what's playing, current song, or now playing.
